mapper.select: SELECT code, area_name AS areaName, parent_code AS parentCode, level FROM tbl_area_node WHERE parent_code = #{parentCode} ORDER BY code
SELECT code, area_name AS areaName, parent_code AS parentCode, level FROM tbl_area_node WHERE level = #{level} ORDER BY code
SELECT code, area_name AS areaName, parent_code AS parentCode, level FROM tbl_area_node WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT code, area_name AS areaName, parent_code AS parentCode, level FROM tbl_area_node ORDER BY level, code
